trends.headline: Medicube Collagen Night Wrapping Mask is SkincareTok's overnight 'glow-wrap' hero
trends.body: Creators are filming 'apply at night, peel-and-reveal in the morning' diaries with this lightweight collagen sleeping wrap that claims to lock in moisture and smooth fine lines while you sleep. Creator angle: a 7-night 'collagen wrapping mask glow test' with morning-after close-ups, or a 'sleeping mask tier list' pitting it against Laneige and Biodance.

trends.headline: 'Cloud skin' is BeautyTok's soft-focus, anti-matte makeup finish
trends.body: Cloud skin — a diffused, blurred, slightly-dewy base that mimics a real-life filter — is the makeup look creators are chasing this summer, replacing both full matte and high glass-skin shine. Creator angle: a 'how I get cloud skin in 5 steps' tutorial, or a 'cloud skin vs glass skin' side-by-side on each half of the face.

trends.headline: The Ordinary's peptide lash & brow serum is BeautyTok's budget growth-serum test
trends.body: Creators are running multi-week 'lash and brow before/after' progress clips with The Ordinary's affordable peptide serum, framing it as the cheap alternative to pricier growth serums. Creator angle: a timestamped 'I used it for 6 weeks' lash diary, or a 'cheap vs luxury brow serum' split test.

trends.headline: Jelly shoes are FashionTok's nostalgic, color-pop summer footwear
trends.body: Translucent jelly flats, mary-janes and sandals are flooding the feed as the playful, slightly-Y2K shoe of summer 2026, styled with everything from slip dresses to denim. Creator angle: a 'styling jelly shoes 4 ways (beach to dinner)' reel, or a 'cheap vs designer jelly shoes' try-on haul.

trends.headline: Multi-layered tops are FashionTok's 'Rachel Green' summer layering revival
trends.body: Stacked tank-over-tee and sheer-over-cami layering — a '90s Rachel Green nod — is back as the easy way to add texture and personality to a basic summer outfit. Creator angle: a 'layering one white tank 5 ways' lookbook, or a 'recreating 90s sitcom outfits with what's in my closet' transition reel.

trends.headline: Coconut iced coffee is FoodTok's tropical summer cafe-copycat drink
trends.body: Iced coffee blended or topped with coconut milk and cream is the summer 'make it at home' cafe drink creators are recreating, framed as a lighter, tropical upgrade on the usual iced latte. Creator angle: a 'I made the viral coconut iced coffee — cafe vs homemade' taste test, or a satisfying ASMR build-and-pour reel.

trends.headline: Yogurt tiramisu is FoodTok's high-protein, no-bake summer dessert
trends.body: A lighter tiramisu made with Greek yogurt, Lotus Biscoff and coffee is going viral as the 'healthy-ish' no-bake dessert of the moment — easy to layer in a clear cup for a satisfying reveal. Creator angle: a 'viral yogurt tiramisu — is it actually good?' first-bite reel, or a 'high-protein dessert you can prep for the week' tutorial.

trends.headline: 'Shy girl workouts' are FitTok's low-pressure, gym-anxiety-friendly format
trends.body: Shy girl workouts — quiet-corner or at-home routines designed to dodge gym anxiety while still being effective — are resonating with beginners who feel intimidated by the main floor. Creator angle: a 'shy girl full-body workout you can do in one corner' demo, or a 'how I beat gym anxiety' confidence-building story.

trends.headline: Wabi-sabi mushroom table lamps are HomeTok's organic-glow accent buy
trends.body: Large textured 'wabi-sabi' table lamps with an organic mushroom silhouette and warm, diffused glow are the under-$100 statement piece creators are using to make a corner feel instantly cozy. Creator angle: a 'this $60 lamp changed my whole living room' before/after, or a 'viral mushroom lamp dupe vs designer' comparison.

trends.headline: The Theragun Mini 2 is TechTok's pocket-sized recovery gadget
trends.body: The compact Theragun Mini 2 is trending with fitness and wellness creators as the 'throw-it-in-your-gym-bag' percussive massager that actually delivers, often demoed right after a workout. Creator angle: a 'gym bag essentials' clip featuring it, or a 'does the mini massage gun actually help DOMS?' honest review.

trends.headline: Prime Day 'viral cart' hauls are creators' cross-category content moment (June 23–26)
trends.body: With Amazon Prime Day live through June 26, creators are racing to post 'what I grabbed on sale' hauls across beauty, home and tech — deal-hunting reels that lean on urgency and 'add-to-cart before it's gone' energy. Creator angle: a 'Prime Day viral finds under $50' speed-haul, or a 'is this TikTok-famous product worth it on sale?' review round-up.

trends.headline: The Doodle Bot drawing robot is ParentTok's screen-free summer entertainer
trends.body: A small robot that holds a pen and draws or teaches kids to draw is going viral with parents as a screen-free way to keep children busy for hours during summer break. Creator angle: a 'screen-free summer activity that actually buys me an hour' demo, or a 'kids react to the Doodle Bot' reaction reel.

trends.headline: Cooling pet mats are PetTok's heat-wave must-have for dogs and cats
trends.body: Pressure-activated cooling gel mats and ice pads for pets are surging as a summer-timed buy, with creators filming dogs and cats flopping onto them in relief during the heat. Creator angle: a 'does my dog actually like the cooling mat?' first-reaction clip, or a 'summer heat must-haves for pets' round-up.

trends.headline: Budget 'X dollars a day' comparison videos are TravelTok's most shareable format
trends.body: Side-by-side cost-of-trip comparisons (like '$50 a day in Albania' or 'Greece vs Turkey for a summer week') are racking up comment-section engagement because viewers tag friends to plan trips together. Creator angle: a '$50/day vs $150/day in the same city' split-screen, or a 'cheapest vs priciest version of this trip' breakdown.

trends.headline: Charm necklaces are JewelryTok's identity-stacking summer statement
trends.body: Maximalist charm-loaded necklaces — each charm representing a memory, pet or inside joke — are replacing minimalist pendants as creators show off 'build your charm necklace with me' clips. Creator angle: a 'building a charm necklace that tells my story' assembly reel, or a 'where to find affordable charms' shopping guide.
